initial_claim: The marriage contract excludes all of the husband's business interests from net family property and limits the wife's right to support.
final_claim: The marriage contract shall equitably distribute business interests and ensure fair support provisions for both spouses, taking into account the needs of any potential children and overall family welfare.
spectator_commentary: In family law, ensuring fairness in distribution of assets and support is crucial not only for the parents but also for the well-being of children. This must be prioritized in the revision of any marital agreements to prevent inequity and promote stability within the family unit.
